transcript: Speaker A: Thank you ಅಣ್ಣ, ಕರೆಕ್ಟ್ ಟೈಮ್‌ಗೆ ಬಂದಿದ್ದೀರಾ. [Thank you brother, you came at the correct time.] Speaker B: You're welcome. Have a great day, brother. Speaker A: ಏನ್ ಗುರು, ಇಷ್ಟು ಸಕ್ಕತ್ತಾಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀರಾ? [What brother, you are speaking English so beautifully?] Speaker B: ಮೊದ್ಲು ನನಗೂ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋಕೆ ತುಂಬಾ ಭಯ ಇತ್ತು. [Earlier, I was also very afraid to speak English.] Speaker A: ಮತ್ತೆ ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲಿತ್ರಿ? [Then how did you learn?] Speaker B: MySivi ಆಪ್‌ನಲ್ಲಿರೋ AI ಟೀಚರ್ ಜೊತೆ ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತಾಡುತ್ತಾ English ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡ್ದೆ. [I practiced English by talking in Kannada every day with the AI teacher in the MySivi app.] Speaker A: ಒಂದು ವೇಳೆ ಮಿಸ್ಟೇಕ್ಸ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ? [What if you make mistakes?] Speaker B: ಎಷ್ಟು ಬೇಕಾದ್ರೂ ತಪ್ಪು ಮಾಡಿ, ಯಾರೂ ನಗಲ್ಲ. ನಿಮ್ಮ ತಪ್ಪುಗಳನ್ನ ಸರಿಪಡಿಸಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಸುತ್ತಾರೆ. [Make as many mistakes as you want, no one will laugh. They correct your mistakes and teach you English.] Speaker A: ಇದು ತುಂಬಾ costly ಆಗಿರಬೇಕಲ್ವಾ? [This must be very costly, right?] Speaker B: ಇಲ್ಲ ಬ್ರೋ, ಬರೀ ಒಂದು ರೂಪಾಯಿಂದ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. ಅದಕ್ಕೆ ಒಂದು ಕೋಟಿ ಜನ ದಿನಾ MySivi ನಲ್ಲಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [No bro, you can start with just one rupee. That's why one crore people learn English on MySivi daily.] Speaker A: Crazy! ನಾನು ಇವತ್ತೇ MySivi ಆಪ್ ಇನ್‌ಸ್ಟಾಲ್ ಮಾಡ್ಕೊಳ್ತೀನಿ. [Crazy! I will install the MySivi app today.]
on_screen_text: Thank you ಅಣ್ಣ [Thank you brother] ಗೆ ಬಂದಿದ್ದೀರಾ You're [you have come, You're] Have a great day brother ಏನ್ ಗುರು [brother, what brother] ಇಷ್ಟು ಸಕ್ಕತ್ತಾಗಿ [so beautifully] ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ [in English] ಮೊದ್ಲು ನನಗೂ [Earlier, I also] ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋಕೆ [to speak English] ತುಂಬಾ ಭಯ ಇತ್ತು [was very afraid] ಮತ್ತೆ ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲಿತ್ರಿ [Then how did you learn] MySivi Practice Now Fluency Score Your Learning Path Talk about anything Daily routine Let's Improve Vocabulary Talk about your childhood Seasons and weather Family and Relationships Hobbies and Interests Talk about your workplace ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ [in Kannada] ಮಾತಾಡುತ್ತಾ english [speaking English] ಒಂದು ವೇಳೆ [In case] ಮಿಸ್ಟೇಕ್ಸ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ [you make mistakes] Grammar Correction Your message: I from Delhi Grammar Feedback: I am from Delhi. Formal, Informal, Friendly I didntk -> didn't -> didnt I didn't know that. Grammar Feedback: I didn't know that. ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಸುತ್ತಾರೆ [they teach English] ಇದು ತುಂಬಾ costly [This is very costly] ಇಲ್ಲ bro [No bro] MySivi Premium LIMITED TIME OFFER 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1 Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today 24/7 AI English Teacher 500+ Exercises and Lessons Unlimited Access Start English Learning -MySivi 10M+ Downloads Install Sivi is now MySivi Improve English speaking with AI Crazy ನಾನು ಇವತ್ತೇ [Crazy, I today itself] mysivi app MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A delivery boy impresses a customer with his fluent English, explaining that he learned it using the MySivi app's AI teacher. He highlights how the app corrects grammar mistakes without judgment and offers a trial for just 1 rupee, prompting the customer to download it.
